desc: a keyless `<For>` item alias that shadows a `$computed` of the same name stays a BARE reference in the loop body (Spike-012 NEW-4 — loopValueBindings excludes it from the computed/accessor rewrite); pre-fix `{{ item }}` inside the loop emitted `item()`, CALLING the raw scalar loop value (TS2349 + runtime TypeError). The same-named computed read OUTSIDE the loop still correctly emits `item()`.
